arts.ttl: Messi meets the Dawg Pound: Soccer superstar leads Inter Miami into Cleveland against Columbus
arts.sum: Instead of Cleveland Browns fans barking at opponents from the bleachers in the East end zone, Crew supporters will take over the space on Saturday when Columbus hosts Inter Miami. “This is a unique moment in time with Messi where we can fill the building and ensure that the first experience that Northeast Ohio has with the Columbus Crew is in a packed house,” said Josh Glessing, the Haslam Sports Group’s chief of strategy development who is also the Crew’s president of business operations.

arts.ttl: Preview: Columbus Crew vs. Inter Miami - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's MLS Playoffs clash between Columbus Crew and Inter Miami, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
